title: Opening for Medical Officer at Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions:
Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions!
